apps.title: Titan Rush
apps.summary:
The tides swallowed up civilization, and Chimera tore apart our homes. The world fell silent, and hope sank beneath the waves. Survivors, welcome to the last refuge—an underwater base. Though it appears run down, it provides safety; though scarce, it contains life. Repair equipment, restart the power, and establish a food supply—Provide a spark of hope for humanity in this refuge. In the depths of the base, a slumbering Titan awaits your awakening—it will become humanity's greatest weapon in its fight to retake the planet, the last guardian in this apocalypse.

[Rebuilding the Base: From Survival to New Life]
Utilize every inch of space and restart the old equipment. From basic power generation to sustainable underwater farms, from residential expansion to military production, every step of progress is crucial for survival. Strategically design your base layout, research post-apocalyptic technology, increase resource production, and build a fortress made for survival in the abyss.

[Repair the Titan: Deep-Sea Blade, Born for Battle] Repair the dormant Titan and unlock multiple weapon systems—high-energy torpedoes, pulse cannons, deep-diving slashing blades… Combine and match equipment to fit your playstyle. Push the limits of your Titan in actual combat. Overwhelm hordes of Chimera with massive firepower, enhance mobility and defense, and prepare for the giant Chimera to attack at any time!

[Commander Rally: Female Commanders in Position]
In the apocalypse, you must look everywhere for assistance. There are logistics commanders skilled in resource management, combat commanders skilled in tactics, engineers specialized in Titan development... Each commander brings different upgrades to both the base and your Titan. Match their skills to build an elite team with survivability and combat prowess. Work together to forge a future amidst the abyss and ruins.

[Explore the Ruins: Dive into the Depths and Rediscover Civilization] A sunken city lies beneath the turbulent waves, holding treasures from before the apocalyptic. Organize expedition teams to infiltrate the dangerous ruins. Search for lost energy cores, scarce survival supplies, and lost technological blueprints… Every exploration could uncover the secrets to turning the tides of battle, or it may turn into a surprise attack from deep-sea monsters; High-risk, high-reward.

[Alliance Benefits: Growing Together] In the apocalypse, a lone boat will struggle to survive. Join or create an Alliance to share technology and resources, and coordinate defenses with your fellow survivors. Participate in Alliance Missions, fight against the giant Chimera, and unite to control strategic deep-sea areas. You no longer face the darkness alone—together we will form humanity's strongest line of defense against the abyss.

>>Download now and return to the last refuge of humanity<<

Check out our official community pages for the newest news and detailed information!
Official website: https://tr.ienjoygame.com/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/people/Titan-Rush/61586521282889
Official Discord: https://discord.gg/4caKTkewPR

apps.title: Word Solitaire
apps.summary:
Word Solitaire is a clever blend of card strategy and word discovery. It's not your usual word game — here, you'll match ideas, uncover connections, and build meaning chains to clear the board. Relax, think, and play your way through hundreds of challenging levels that twist the classic solitaire formula into something totally fresh.

A New Kind of Word Challenge
What happens when solitaire meets the art of finding hidden connections?
Each level starts with a few cards on the table and a full deck waiting to be revealed.
Draw cards one by one, find the right categories, and place matching words in their proper spots. Just like solitaire, smart planning matters — one misplaced card can change everything.

How to Play:
- Tap to draw cards from the deck.
- Place category cards first to create a foundation.
- Add all related word cards to complete the group.
- Clear all stacks to win the level.

It's simple to learn but deeply satisfying to master.

Why You'll Enjoy It:
- A relaxing mix of solitaire logic and word connection puzzles
- Hundreds of handcrafted levels full of clever links and surprises
- No timers, no rush — play at your own pace
- Smooth design and rewarding progression
- Ideal for fans of word, logic, and card games

Play in Your Language
Word Solitaire is now available in multiple languages — switch the game to the one that feels most natural to you:
🇫🇷 French · 🇩🇪 German · 🇪🇸 Spanish · 🇷🇺 Russian · 🇵🇹 Portuguese · 🇹🇷 Turkish · 🇯🇵 Japanese · 🇰🇷 Korean
One game, endless languages — for players all around the world.

Train Your Brain, One Word at a Time
Every match you make sharpens your reasoning and vocabulary. Think outside the box, spot the hidden connection, and feel that "aha" moment with every correct pairing.

What Players Are Saying
"Brilliant combination of cards and words. Totally addictive."
"Perfect balance of thinking and relaxing — my new favorite puzzle."
"So satisfying when you find the hidden link."

Whether you love word games, card games, or brain teasers, Word Solitaire delivers the best of all worlds. It's clever, calm, and endlessly replayable.

apps.title: BagMaster Isekai – Bag Battle
apps.summary:
ATTENTION ADVENTURERS

One minute you’re just chilling, playing your favorite game, and then next suddenly you’re IN the game! Welcome to the world of isekai, where you, the player, get to experience being transported to a whole new world. Here you’ll be helping the local piggies defeat waves of enemies in this delightful turn-based RPG. Collect and merge items in your bag to create awesome weapons, explore dungeons and castles, battle bosses, and test your strategy skills: on your mark, get set, oink!

SURVIVAL OF THE SMARTEST

In this roguelike RPG, you’ll have a chance before each wave of enemies to try and max out your weapons by merging them and using synergy to create bigger, better, and badder equipment. You’ll also have a chance to pick which buff you want to add at the end of the battle, allowing you to create and build on a strategy. The fun never ends in this role playing isekai game as you also get to explore new territories and grow your character!

Fun features:

- Bag it up – A key mechanic of this turn-based role playing game is your backpack. Use it to both store your gear as well as merge individual pieces to create stronger weapons and equipment.

- Waves on waves of enemies – as all good tactical strategy games go, this one too features tons of waves of increasingly strong enemies and bosses for you to test your ideas and might out on. That also gives you a chance to change tactics if you feel like your survival is at risk! Between battles you can make little adjustments that will add up over time and help you win… if you’re smart.

- Turn based strategy – that’s right, all those little buffs and weapons merges will either help or hinder you, and there’s no way of knowing if you picked the right battle plan until you’re facing down a horde of bosses. That’s the true joy of this type of roguelike RPG game!

- Roguelike goodness – As you wipe out your enemies and fight for survival, have fun exploring the various levels and learning more about your new world. Navigate through the maze of monsters as you level up and get to know your piggy overlords. The roguelike mechanics will make this isekai role playing game feel familiar for fans of the genre, while also being accessible to newer players.

- Fun in the sun – despite all the strategizing and merging and fighting you’ll be doing, this game is still about having fun after all! Build out your character, explore new realms, and of course, enjoy the great graphics and sound effects. With short battle waves you can always find time to squeeze in a fight or two!

THE OINKIEST TACTICAL STRATEGY GAME

Come one, come all, and let yourselves be transported to an exciting new world thanks to this roguelike role playing game. Use your magical bag to create the ultimate weapons as you seek survival by making the right choices each round. Let the turn-based roguelike mechanics lead the way as you battle your way through this dungeon crawler tactical strategy game and prove your might.

Privacy Policy: https://say.games/privacy-policy
Terms of Use: https://say.games/terms-of-use

apps.title: Baseball Hits 26
apps.summary:
Baseball Hits 26 is an officially licensed MLB Players, Inc. Game.

⚾PLAY WITH MLBPI SUPERSTARS. ANYTIME, ANYWHERE.
Enter the ballpark, step up to the plate, and experience the thrill of real baseball, officially licensed by MLB Players, Inc. Collect and play with today’s biggest baseball superstars in an easy-to-learn, deeply satisfying mobile baseball game built for fans.

🎮EASY TO PLAY. HARD TO PUT DOWN.
Tap to swing, time it right, and send it deep. Every pitch, hit, and home run feels authentic with lifelike motion-captured animation, realistic baseball physics, and stats based on real-life MLBPI superstars. Whether you’re chasing a clutch hit, the intensity of 9 innings, throwing strikes in Pitching Ace, or crushing moonshots in Homerun King, every swing and pitch delivers that big-league adrenaline.

🧢BUILD YOUR DREAM LINEUP WITH OFFICIAL MLBPI PLAYERS
Recruit and upgrade over 800 official MLBPI baseball superstars! Featuring cover athlete Cal Raleigh, the switch-hitting home run force, alongside five-tool dynamo José Ramírez, generational slugger Juan Soto, power pitcher strikeout ace Tarik Skubal, lightning-fast playmaker Corbin Carroll, and run-producing masher Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

Mix current MLBPI legends with top-ranked rising stars like Jackson Holliday, power-hitting breakout talents like Junior Caminero, and postseason breakout arms like Trey Yesavage to craft the ultimate roster. Level them up, and climb through competitive tiers to prove your lineup belongs among the elite.

🏆COMPETE AND WIN TOGETHER
Join a Club to connect with other fans, chat, and compete through live events and tournaments. Work as a team to earn rewards, climb leaderboards, and rule the diamond. Every win counts, and clubs win bigger together, so go ahead and beat your baseball rivals.

SHORT SESSIONS. BIG MOMENTS.
Designed for mobile, Baseball Hits 26 fits perfectly into your day. Play a quick inning on break or battle through all 9 innings in a full playoff run at night! The pace is fast, the action believable, and every at-bat matters. Play your way:
⚾Hits Mode: Step into the batter's box and lead your team to victory
🔥Pitching Ace: Aim, release, and fool batters with perfect timing
💥Total Baseball: Hit and pitch for the full baseball experience
👑Homerun King: Pure power-hitting fun with streak bonuses
🏆Events & Tournaments: Time-limited challenges with exclusive rewards!

BEAT YOUR BASEBALL RIVALS. CLIMB THE RANKS. BUILD YOUR LEGACY.
Rise from rookie to legend as you progress through tiers, unlock powerful baseball superstars, and chase special edition stars that celebrate the best in the game. Earn reward boxes, collect currency, and keep improving season after season.

A LIVING BASEBALL WORLD WITH OFFICIAL MLBPI PLAYERS
With ongoing live events, player drops, and new content year-round, Baseball Hits 26 is more than a baseball game; it’s your home for authentic baseball action on mobile. Every update brings new challenges, new baseball stars, and new reasons to play.

KEY FEATURES:
⚾Officially licensed by MLB Players, Inc. Real players and real stats
☝️Simple tap-to-swing and tap-to-pitch gameplay
💥Authentic baseball physics and motion-captured animations
📈Deep roster-building and player progression
🏆Clubs, leaderboards, and live competitions
💎Free-to-play with optional in-app purchases

Baseball Hits 26 is EASY to play, FUN to master, and BUILT FOR BASEBALL FANS.⚾

JOIN THE CLUBHOUSE!
Get the latest news and celebrate big wins on our official Baseball Hits 26 Discord. We’d love your feedback as we continue to build the most fun, authentic baseball experience on mobile

apps.title: Retro Racing
apps.summary:
Touch-first steering that finally gets mobile racing right!

Take the wheel of classic retro cars and race through beautifully crafted tracks with controls built from the ground up to be easily played one handed. Smooth, precise, and satisfying from the very first turn.

Focused on the joy of driving.

Features:
• One-Handed Play. Designed for portrait mode so you can race with one hand — on the bus, in bed, wherever. No need to flip your phone sideways.
• Built for Touch. Steering designed specifically for mobile, delivering precise, intuitive control that makes every corner feel right.
• Classic Cars with Character. Charming, old-school cars inspired by real classics — each with its own weight, handling, and personality.
• A Driving Feel You'll Love. Carefully tuned physics make every drift smooth, every race immersive, and every lap worth one more try.
• Pick Up & Play. Easy to learn, hard to master. Perfect for a quick race on the bus or a long session on the couch.
• Stylish, Clean Visuals. A nostalgic aesthetic that complements the cars without distracting from the road.

Whether you're a racing fan or just want a game that feels good to play, focused on classic cars and great controls.

Start your engine and feel the road!

apps.title: The Urban Rewind
apps.summary:
The Urban Rewind is a timed, multiple-choice trivia game centered on music and pop culture. Players test their knowledge across entertainment categories while managing a virtual currency system (“Mics”), unlocking achievements, and progressing through tiered levels.

Categories & Access

At launch, players have access to:
* Hip-Hop
* R&B

The TV and Movies categories are visible but locked, indicated with a lock icon.

Players begin with 3 Mics. Locked categories and additional Mics can be purchased via in-app purchases. Tapping a locked category or “Buy Mics” opens the checkout interface with the correct product and pricing.

On successful purchase:
* Mic balances or category access update immediately.
* If a category is unlocked, the user is automatically taken to that category’s “Good Luck” screen.
On failed or canceled transactions:
* The user returns to the previous screen.
* No changes are made to access or Mic balance.

Players can assign purchased Mics to specific categories from the Play screen. During active gameplay, Mics default to the current category but may be adjusted.

Gameplay & Mic Rules

Each session presents one question at a time with four answer choices (A/B/C/D). After selecting an answer, players receive immediate feedback (“Correct” or “Incorrect”) along with explanatory text.

Mics function as the attempt system:
* A player is not considered to have lost while 1 Mic remains.
* If prompted to purchase Mics at this stage, the gameplay timer resets to 10 seconds once the prompt is accepted or dismissed.
A loss occurs only when the Mic count reaches 0.
* When this happens, the session ends and a Results screen is displayed.
* If a user purchases Mics after reaching 0, they cannot resume the ended session. They must restart the category from 0 correct answers (clean restart), though they may restart within their highest unlocked level band.
* After purchasing Mics following a loss, users are redirected to the Home screen.

Leveling & Progression
Each category features a cumulative badge system. All badges are grayed out at the start.

Level thresholds:
* Gold: 15 correct answers
* Platinum: 20 additional correct answers
* Multi-Platinum: 25 additional correct answers
* Diamond: 30 additional correct answers

Levels must be completed sequentially.

Once Diamond is achieved:
* The category is considered complete.
* The user is routed back to the beginning to replay the category.
* The Diamond badge remains visible until Gold is reached again during replay.

The highest level achieved in each category is permanently recorded. If a user exits or loses, they resume from the difficulty band of their highest unlocked level rather than starting from the beginning.

Audio & Sponsor Integration

Sponsor-provided background music (Artist + Title) plays on:
* Splash screen
* Login screen
* Rules screen
* Category selection screen

Music is ON by default when the app launches or when returning to the main screen. Users may tap a track to open an external link (e.g., Spotify or social media) in their browser.

During gameplay:
* Correct and Incorrect sound effects play for every question.
* On level-up, a dedicated Level-Up sound plays, and background music is temporarily paused.

UI & Session Management
Before starting any category, users see a “Good Luck” screen displaying their current level.

If a user leaves mid-session, the app saves:
* Question index
* Mic count
* Progress

Upon returning, users are prompted to Continue or Start Over.

A Results screen appears when:
* The user exits,
* A level threshold is reached, or
* Mics reach 0.

The Results screen displays total correct and incorrect answers, Mic changes, and the next milestone required for level advancement.

apps.title: Epic Bum Ride
apps.summary:
Got a cardboard box?
Good.
Now find the biggest hill and SEND IT.
In Epic Bum Ride, you play as a fearless bum chasing one thing — maximum distance. Slide down crazy hills, bounce off obstacles, and build insane momentum to beat your best run.
Forget coins.
Out here, the real currency is Hot Dogs 🌭 and Bottle Caps 🥤.
Collect hot dogs to power up your runs and grab bottle caps to unlock wild upgrades. The more you improve, the farther you ride. The farther you ride… the more chaotic it gets.
🛹 Features:
🏔 Endless downhill sliding action
📦 Upgrade your cardboard box for speed & durability
🌭 Collect Hot Dogs for boosts
🥤 Gather Bottle Caps to unlock upgrades
💥 Funny ragdoll physics & ridiculous crashes
📈 Distance-based progression system
Simple controls.
Crazy physics.
Pure downhill madness.
How far can your box survive?
Download Epic Bum Ride and start sliding today!

apps.title: Immortal Clan: Grandmastery
apps.summary: Download now get an exclusive disciple and 150 draws!
apps.description:
Immortal Clan: Grandmastery is an Eastern fantasy xiuxian simulation and management mobile game. Your journey takes place in a fantastical world ripped from the pages of a xiuxian novel. As the founding master, you will build your own sect from scratch. You will recruit disciples with distinct personalities and quirks, assign them to daily production tasks and guide their cultivation. Under your guidance, they will eventually transcend mortality and ascend to immortality. In this world, every character has the potential to be the protagonist. Best of all, resources could be passed down without any cost, ensuring an easy and fun cultivation experience!

Build your own sect from scratch
· Begin by claiming a wild, untamed mountain and building your sect with your bare hands.
· From building facilities and planning the overall layout of hundreds of constructions, you have total control over shaping the sect's destiny.
· Planting, mining, alchemy, crafting and all sorts of production yield help your sect flourish.

An Orthodox Xiuxian World of Eastern Fantasy
· Stepping into the grand world of eastern Xiuxian, you will take on the role of the sect's founding master and forge your path to becoming an unfading legend.
· The interplay of rival sects, untangled forces, and mysterious rifts creates a deeply immersive Xiuxian world.
· Dispatch your disciples across the world to explore ancient rifts, gather rare artifacts, and encounter the unknown.

A Highly Customized Disciple Cultivation System
· In this Xiuxian world, every disciple is a unique individual with distinct appearance, personality, quirks, and destiny.
· Disciples were shaped by their own traits: some were born fighters, while others excel at daily productions. The sect thrives only when you match each disciple's strengths to their perfect role.
· Even the most unassuming disciple could be of vital assistance if placed wisely. It all depends on your discerning eye.

A Choice-Driven Cultivation Process
· Cultivation is more than just stacking stats. In this game, you get to forge a completely unique path by experimenting with countless combinations of Techniques and Skills.
· There is no single set path. Guide your disciples to choose their own destiny—whether they walk the righteous Immortal Way or the ruthless Demonic Way.
· Progress need not be a grind. With the Impartation system, disciples can master new Techniques without losing hard-earned cultivation, eliminating the burden of starting over.

Fight for the Sect
· The law of the jungle reigns here! When conflict becomes inevitable, you must lead your disciples into battle against all foes.
· Forge alliances with other players in this vast Xiuxian world. Your strategic choices will shape not only your sect's destiny but also the fate of others.
· Battle roaming demonic monsters, powerful world bosses, rival sects, and the hidden forces of the dark demon realm.
· Every victory brings glorious rewards—rare items, Artifacts and Gear. Fight for the glory of the sect!

apps.title: Tricky Mean2
apps.summary:
A sequel to “Torimin” is here! “Tricky Mean 2” is out now!

The mischievous puzzle game where you move items to change the illustration is back and better than ever!
The popular “move to solve” mechanic from the first game returns, with upgraded stage designs, gimmicks, and visual effects!

Help a woman win back her husband’s attention, solve chaotic trouble-filled scenes with clever ideas, and tackle plenty of delightfully tricky challenges waiting for you!

・Tons of new stages added
・Even more deceptive twists
・Upgraded satisfying success effects

Whether you cleared the first game or you’re brand new, there’s something here for you!

apps.title: Murderhill
apps.summary:
Murderhill: Horror Escape is a cool mix of mystery adventure games and survival horror games in one unrivaled experience. Break things around, get resources, upgrade weapons, and fight against shadows to survive the night in the woods.

A place that used to host parties in the forest suddenly became a mysterious Occult location. All residents and guests disappeared without a trace and our main character needs to solve the mystery of the silent night. However, challenges and various mystical creatures will appear in the way, so the main goal is to survive the night in the mystery adventure games.

🔍 EXPLORE NEW LANDS

Explore the abandoned places of Murderhill, find out why the beautiful place turned into an endless night in the woods. Meet the scary details of survival horror games around: blood trails, dark portals, large footprints and unusual shadows watching you.

🪓 SURVIVAL RPG WITH CRAFT

Break things around you for resources, and craft new tools and weapons. The better your outfit, the easier it will be to survive the night in this dangerous survival horror games.

🔮 IMPROVE YOUR RUNES

Find an ancient book in the middle of a mystery house and learn ancient occult magic with runes. Search for runes in Murderhill of different rarities and upgrade your characteristics. Without this power, it will be difficult for you to fight in survival horror games.

👤 BECOME THE SHADOW HUNTER

Pistol, machine gun or magical powers? Choose and upgrade your weapon from a devastating arsenal of survival RPG. Use different fighting styles to destroy monsters of mystery adventure games.

🚧 CLEAR RAIDS

Go on dangerous raids for important resources and powerful runes. Each raid is a unique challenge! Unusual locations with enemies at every turn await you. Maybe you can solve the occult mystery of this horror survival games.

👫 SAVE OTHER SURVIVORS

In this survival RPG it is important to join forces to confront the darkness. Save other survivors by making horror escape on this silent night and protecting them from the shadows while they fortify their shelter. Go with them for resources and hunt for shadows and bosses.

🪵 PREPARE FOR THE NIGHT

In Murderhill: Mystery Adventure Games, when the silent night falls and the light is replaced by darkness, you will need all your survival skills to horror escape from the Forest Guest and other scary monsters.

🕵️ SOLVE THE MYSTERY

Search for letters and various clues to learn about the history of this mysterious village. Find the key to solving what happened in the forest and why all this horror escape began.

In Murderhill: Horror Survival Games, every dark moment is a desperate struggle to survive the night and face the terrifying unknown. Explore dark forests and abandoned houses in one of the most intense survival horror games and mystery adventure games. Solve puzzles, horror escape deadly traps and survive the night while something watches from the shadows. Every night in the woods hides new dangers, and even a silent night can conceal terrifying secrets.

Murderhill: Horror Escape is a free-to-play survival rpg experience where every decision matters. Search for clues, uncover the truth behind the haunted town, and test your courage in one of the most chilling survival horror games. Only the bravest players will manage to survive the night in this dark world of mystery adventure games.

apps.title: Warframe
apps.summary: Battle alongside your friends in this story-driven, online action game.
apps.description:
Awaken as an unstoppable warrior and battle alongside your friends in this story-driven, free-to-play online action game.

BECOME A POWERFUL WARRIOR

Enter your Warframe: a biomechanical avatar of untold power. Unleash its Abilities and wield a vast array of devastating weaponry to annihilate hordes of enemies. In between the carnage, you can earn or instantly unlock 57+ different Warframes — each with unique suites of powers to let you control the mayhem any way you want.

BATTLE ALONGSIDE FRIENDS

Form a Squad with your friends and earn valuable bonus Rewards when you complete Missions together via highly collaborative, co-operative gameplay. Utilize your Warframe’s Abilities to heal allies, redirect enemy fire, and accomplish your objectives. Stuck on a particular challenge? In-game matchmaking makes it easy to connect with friendly Tenno whenever you need a helping hand!

EXPLORE A MASSIVE SYSTEM

Deftly maneuver through ground-based Missions with your Warframe’s mesmerizing parkour skills or take to the stars and engage in massive ship-to-ship battles in your very own customizable spacecraft. Lose yourself within mysterious open-world landscapes and discover a system teeming with fascinating lifeforms - both friendly and hostile.

DISCOVER AN EPIC STORY

Lose yourself in the sweeping history of the Origin System as you experience Warframe’s massive cinematic narrative which includes 10+ years of sprawling expansions and story-based Quests. Discover the power within and experience your first taste of invincibility with one of three original Warframes before you begin your journey, then develop your skills and seek out the truth behind your awakening.

MASTER YOUR ARSENAL

Your starter Weapons are only the beginning. Craft hundreds of destructive armaments, plus vehicles, Companions and so much more. Level them up and experiment until you find the right combination of weaponry that suits your unique playstyle. Fashion your gear for a fearsome look to compliment your custom-designed Loadout.

CUSTOMIZE ENDLESSLY

Entering the Origin System means joining 70+ million Tenno, each with their own personalized Warframes, Weapons and gear. With a staggering number of Customization options available to enhance your Loadout, designing the perfect look for your Warframe makes for an endlessly rewarding challenge for you and your Squad.
